---
title : "Promoting an Open Research Culture"
date : "2015-06-01"
author : ["B. A. Nosek", "G. Alter", "G. C. Banks", "D. Borsboom", "S. D. Bowman", "S. J. Breckler", "S. Buck", "C. D. Chambers", "G. Chin", "G. Christensen", "M. Contestabile", "A. Dafoe", "E. Eich", "J. Freese", "R. Glennerster", "D. Goroff", "D. P. Green", "B. Hesse", "M. Humphreys", "J. Ishiyama", "D. Karlan", "A. Kraut", "A. Lupia", "P. Mabry", "T. Madon", "N. Malhotra", "E. Mayo-Wilson", "M. McNutt", "E. Miguel", "E. Levy Paluck", "U. Simonsohn", "C. Soderberg", "B. A. Spellman", "J. Turitto", "G. VandenBos", "S. Vazire", "E. J. Wagenmakers", "R. Wilson", "T. Yarkoni"]
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "Science, 348(6242) 1422--1425  [https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aab2374](https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aab2374)"
publication_short : "Science, 348(6242) 1422--1425  [https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aab2374](https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aab2374)"
abstract : "Author guidelines for journals could help to promote transparency, openness, and reproducibility Author guidelines for journals could help to promote transparency, openness, and reproducibility"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

B. A. Nosek, G. Alter, G. C. Banks, D. Borsboom, S. D. Bowman, S. J. Breckler, S. Buck, C. D. Chambers, G. Chin, G. Christensen, M. Contestabile, A. Dafoe, E. Eich, J. Freese, R. Glennerster, D. Goroff, D. P. Green, B. Hesse, M. Humphreys, J. Ishiyama, D. Karlan, A. Kraut, A. Lupia, P. Mabry, T. Madon, N. Malhotra, E. Mayo-Wilson, M. McNutt, E. Miguel, E. Levy Paluck, U. Simonsohn, C. Soderberg, B. A. Spellman, J. Turitto, G. VandenBos, S. Vazire, E. J. Wagenmakers, R. Wilson, T. Yarkoni (2015). *Promoting an Open Research Culture*. Science, 348(6242) 1422--1425  [https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aab2374](https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aab2374)

:::
